subject: Temporary change of ccsdk parent
commit_message:
Temporary change of ccsdk parent

The current released ccsdk has a non-existant
version of oparent. I am making this temporary change
so our jenkins builds can continue.

Change-Id: I5776e4d3f6b7f5fde13e114ce873bc23bb76b5de
Signed-off-by: Patrick Brady <pb071s@att.com>
Issue-ID: CCSDK-147

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/appc-master-verify-java/658/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.onap.oparent:oparent-odlparent:pom:1.0.0 needed for sub-project org.openecomp.appc:appc-common:bundle:1.3.0-SNAPSHOT: Failed to collect dependencies at org.onap.ccsdk.sli.core:dblib-provider:jar:0.1.2: Failed to read artifact descriptor for org.onap.ccsdk.sli.core:dblib-provider:jar:0.1.2. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/appc-master-verify-java/658/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/appc-master-verify-java/658

Abandoned

This is not going to fix the problem. The dependencies of the new parent pom end up pointing back to the one that doesn't work
